case_title: AUSTIN LAI VS. GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LAI, AUSTIN GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, AUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AUSTIN LAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL IANTORNO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2024 - JUDGMENT.
